Dear 🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

I am writing to you with a sincere request for attention and compassion.

I am building my business in the UAE and I am deeply grateful to this country for the opportunities it provides to people from all over the world. As a woman who is building her business independently in the construction and design field, I especially appreciate the values of support, fairness and humanity that the UAE represents.

I also know that you have shown great compassion and care for animals. Many people remember the cases where you personally helped protect and save animals.

Unfortunately, the situation on Palm Jumeirah has recently become very difficult. Due to the ongoing park renovation, there are large-scale construction works, trees are being removed, many areas are closed, and the noise from demolition and construction sometimes continues almost around the clock.

Today a very tragic incident happened. Because many pedestrian routes are closed and there is little safety control, teenagers are riding bicycles and other vehicles through green zones and children’s playground areas. One of them ran over my small puppy. At the moment my puppy is in a very serious condition and suffering from severe seizures.

This is extremely painful and heartbreaking.

Palm Jumeirah has always been a place where people live closely with nature and animals — there are parrots, stray cats, and most residents have pets.

I sincerely ask you to please pay attention to the safety situation and living conditions in this area during the renovation period. At the moment it has become very difficult and concerning for residents and for animals.

I still believe in the humanity, compassion and justice for which this country is known.

Thank you very much for your attention and for everything you do.

Respectfully,
Alena Strezh

Your Majesty,�Greetings of the day.
My name is Yashvardhan Yadav, a respected resident of the United Arab Emirates since 27/05/2024. With due respect, I wish to bring to your kind attention a matter that has caused me great distress and hardship.
I applied for a driving license in August 2025, and now in 2026, I find myself still unsuccessful due to repeated failures by the driving school. I strongly feel that the institute has been unfairly failing students without valid or genuine reasons. To date, I have paid approximately AED 5,800 in fees. Most recently, I was failed in the final road test despite not making any significant mistake, and the examiner’s behavior was also discourteous and unprofessional.
Your Majesty, until this experience, my journey in the UAE under your gracious leadership has been truly wonderful. However, this incident has left me feeling a sense of injustice. I have exhausted all my savings paying the driving school’s fees and am now in a situation where I do not even have sufficient funds to book a flight to return home.
Obtaining a driving license was my only hope to secure a stable livelihood and continue surviving here. Unfortunately, I have now lost that opportunity as well.
I humbly request your kind consideration and intervention in this matter, so that justice may be served.
With deepest respect and regards,
Yashvardhan Yadav
